title: It's-a Me, Mario Day!

title: Harriet Tubman: Hero of Freedom Day
story: Every March 10, people across America celebrate Harriet Tubman Day to honor one of history's bravest heroes. Harriet Tubman escaped slavery and then risked her life many times to help other enslaved people find freedom through the Underground Railroad. Today, schools hold special lessons about her courage, libraries display books about her amazing life, and communities organize events to remember her legacy. Many people visit museums or historical sites connected to her story. Social media fills with posts sharing her inspiring quotes and incredible achievements. This day reminds us that one person's bravery can change the world.

A real train that ran underground through tunnels
A subway system in the southern states

activity_answer: A secret network that helped enslaved people escape to freedom
bonus_fact: Harriet Tubman never lost a single person on her Underground Railroad missions.
